results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√ghṛṣ P. -gharṣati, to rub together or against each other, contend or vie with (instr.),  MBh. ;  Ragh.  :
Pass. -ghṛṣyate, to be rubbed or wetted (as a sword),  Subh. ;
(pr. p. -ghṛṣyat), to be brought or come into collision, vie or rival with (also with paras-param),  MBh.

results.rendered_html:
saṃghṛṣ 1 P.
1 To rub or grind together.
2 To rival, emulate, compete or vie with; sa prayoganipuṇaiḥ prayoktṛbhiḥ saṃjagharṣa saha mivasaṃnidhau  R. 19. 36. 
3 To rub, scratch.
